{% if no_query %}
Enter a query above and click Summarise to build a query-focused LSA summary.
{% else if !has_summary %}
No text-bearing primary records matched "{{ q }}".
Numeric measurements are skipped; either no matching records exist or every match was a numeric telemetry value.
{% else %}
LSA Summary for {{ q }}
{% if max_sentences == 0 %} sized: auto {% else %} max sentences: {{ max_sentences }} {% endif %}
{{ summary }}
{% endif %}
